CustomField.description: When non-null, WorkItem after-insert/update fires an immediate Queueable callout to CrossOrgGanttPeerUrlTxt__c (Layer 2 of live-events architecture). Replaces the asynchronous SyncItem-ledger drain for WorkItem field changes only — the existing SyncEngine remains the durable retry log and continues to handle non-fast-lane fields. Null = bridge off (slow-lane only). Pair with the peer URL + secret fields and EnableLiveGanttEventsDateTime__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to enable immediate cross-org bridge for WorkItem changes. Leave blank to fall back to SyncEngine slow-lane.
CustomField.label: Enable Immediate Cross Org Bridge
